batch_objective: #11 Q1/Q2 legend feature: (Q1) a red-flag / classification legend in the generated report, and (Q2) an in-app per-view 'Legend' button surfacing the classification tables (A2L row colour, Status, Linkage). The classification semantics are already drafted (REQUIREMENTS.md 'Severity / colour conventions' + the batch-14 Phase-0 history) and are the single source of truth: Red=schema/structural failure; Green=memory-checked+present; White=valid record without image hit; Grey=not-yet-checked; MAC adds Orange=warning-level overlap/alias/symbol-only. Legend content MUST be derived from color_policy.py SEVERITY_CLASS_MAP / the documented conventions, not re-invented.
